'''dhadhungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hea|hea]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-dh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hea|hea]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhadhungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhædhingith|dhædhingith]] || [[word:dhædhingij|dhædhingij]] || [[word:dhædhingish|dhædhingish]] || [[word:dhædhingi|dhædhingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhadhudhunguth|dhadhudhunguth]] || [[word:dhadhudhunguj|dhadhudhunguj]] || [[word:dhadhudhungush|dhadhudhungush]] || [[word:dhadhudhungu|dhadhudhungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhadhunguth|dhadhunguth]] || [[word:dhadhunguj|dhadhunguj]] || [[word:dhadhungush|dhadhungush]] || [[word:dhadhungu|dhadhungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhadhufngufth|dhadhufngufth]] || [[word:dhadhufngufj|dhadhufngufj]] || [[word:dhadhufngufsh|dhadhufngufsh]] || [[word:dhadhufnguf|dhadhufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhadhunguthu|dhadhunguthu]] || [[word:dhadhunguju|dhadhunguju]] || [[word:dhadhungushu|dhadhungushu]] || [[word:dhadhunguku|dhadhunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhadhunguth|dhadhunguth]] || [[word:dhadhunguj|dhadhunguj]] || [[word:dhadhungush|dhadhungush]] || [[word:dhadhungu|dhadhungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhadhunguthul|dhadhunguthul]] || [[word:dhadhungujul|dhadhungujul]] || [[word:dhadhungushul|dhadhungushul]] || [[word:dhadhungukul|dhadhungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhadhunguuthuthu|dhadhunguuthuthu]] || [[word:dhadhunguujuju|dhadhunguujuju]] || [[word:dhadhunguushushu|dhadhunguushushu]] || [[word:dhadhunguuku|dhadhunguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhadhunguthun|dhadhunguthun]] || [[word:dhadhungujun|dhadhungujun]] || [[word:dhadhungushun|dhadhungushun]] || [[word:dhadhungukun|dhadhungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhadhunguthuoro|dhadhunguthuoro]] || [[word:dhadhungujuoro|dhadhungujuoro]] || [[word:dhadhungushuoro|dhadhungushuoro]] || [[word:dhadhungukuoro|dhadhungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a890715}}
